name: 11ty Portfolio
description: This very website! Built with Eleventy (11ty), Tailwind CSS, and hosted on Docker with CI/CD. Features a blog, view/like tracking API, dark/light/system theme, and full SEO metadata.

name: 11ty Stats Tracker
description: A Python-based analytics tracker + Chart.js dashboard for monitoring page views and engagement across the portfolio. Runs on a systemd timer and stores historical data for trend analysis.

name: ElevenTCMS
description: A browser-based CMS built specifically for Eleventy sites. Features live preview (Nunjucks), media management, Git commit/push, Stripe payments, and full self-hosted Docker deployment.

name: CPE Watch
description: ISP customer premises equipment health monitor. Polls SNMP for DOCSIS cable modem & GPON ONT metrics (signal levels, errors, uptime), alerts via email on degradation, and provides a real-time dashboard.

name: OPNsense WOL Dashboard
description: A simple Express.js dashboard for sending Wake-on-LAN magic packets to devices on the home network. Integrated with OPNsense for one-click host wake-up.

name: Hermes Paper Trader
description: A fully-automated robo-advisor running on a cron schedule. Manages a $10K portfolio per account using a dividend-focused, tax-aware strategy with periodic rebalancing. Tracks SCHD, VOO, JNJ, KO.
